title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 37.1096 - Confidential information not to be included in database — state immunity from liability, when
text:
37.1096.  Confidential information not to be included in database — state immunity from liability, when. — The Missouri local government expenditure database shall not include any confidential information or any information that is not a public record under the laws of this state.  However, the state shall not be liable for the disclosure of a record in the Missouri local government expenditure database that is confidential information or is not a public record under the laws of this state.
(L. 2021 H.B. 271)
